reviews.review_title: I’m mad and wanna be unbanned
reviews.review_description: I got the game today but for some reason I had applab manager idk why but the TMGmunker and mk joined and they got me banned forever I explained what happened but they didn’t believe me please unban me I loved the game I’m really sad I cried when I got banned please unban me

Please get this game, it is SO good, that i actually stopped playing one of my favorite games to play this one. All of the maps are made SO well, the mod menus have good mods and their custom ones, and most of the game is good.

reviews.review_title: Munky terror had so much potential...
reviews.review_description: The game is good. Hope you bring back Munky terror soon.
I played for the first time and its amazing
